json_data.title: Programming Language Semantics
json_data.reason: Understanding formal semantics provides the rigorous foundation necessary to specify and reason about program behavior, complementing the application of formal verification to operating systems.

json_data.title: Verified Compilers
json_data.reason: This topic applies formal verification to another critical system component, a compiler, requiring deeper understanding of program transformation and proof engineering at a higher level of complexity than an OS component.

json_data.title: Foundational Certified Software Stacks
json_data.reason: This cutting-edge research area aims to build an entire software ecosystem with end-to-end formal correctness guarantees, extending OS verification to encompass all layers from hardware to applications.
